message:
Add MCP integration test (Task 5)

Full-flow test: in-process MCP server with greet tool -> MCPManager ->
Session tool registry -> fakeAdapter calls ext__greet -> result flows
back through ProcessInput. Verifies tool discovery, system prompt
inclusion, and end-to-end invocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
